channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: NTSB gathering details on Frontier Airlines evacuation after plane hit and killed person in Denver
item.description: The National Transportation Safety Board says it is gathering information about the evacuation of a Frontier Airlines plane after it hit a person on the runway at Denver International Airport during takeoff.

item.title: Tennessee redistricting plan splits Memphis neighbors and reshapes midterms as other states follow
Oregon Democrats found a way to improve roads. Now their gas tax goes before voters as prices soar
